English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
United Nations Food and Agriculture Organization home economics publications
Jenkins, Ludmilla A.
4910
2 cubic feet. 2 cubic feet.
1960-1988. Publications. Publications relating to the work of FAO and other organizations. Subjects include home economics, planning, child care, food and nutrition, textiles and clothing, consumer education, the role of women, and family issues, particularly in Africa. Collection material in English 2691204
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
August 2017
EAD encoding:
Marcie Farwell, August 2017
Date modified:
Kristen Reichenbach, August 2018
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Publications relating to the work of FAO and other organizations. Subjects include home economics, planning, child care, food and nutrition, textiles and clothing, consumer education, the role of women, and family issues, particularly in Africa.
Cite As:
United Nations Food and Agriculture Organization Home Economics Publications, #4910. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Biographical / Historical
Ludmilla A. Marin (Jenkins) was the head of Home Economics for the Food and Agriculture Organization (FAO).
Biographical / Historical
. Cornell University Class of 1937, Home Economics.
Consumer education. Textile fabrics. Child care. Home economics -- Study and teaching. United Nations. Food and Agriculture Organization Cornell University. Class of 1937
